title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi 4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, push, create, list, copy, delete models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama: same features as Python SDK, works in Node & browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, embeddings, tool-calling within LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama: chat UI, model manager, RAG, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama REST API with colourful chat REPL and model management shortcuts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app using ollama-js and Tailwind; single HTML file drop-in replacement for ChatGPT UI.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Turn any folder of documents into a local RAG chatbot with Ollama + Chroma + Sentence-Transformers.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama: chat, generate, pull, push, list, copy, delete with async & streaming support.

title: ollama-codellama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds CodeLlama-powered code completion, explain, refactor and unit-test generation.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flask/Vue desktop app to chat with Ollama models; packaged as portable Electron binary.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration: use Ollama models as generators or chat in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for Ollama REST API with synchronous and asynchronous HTTP client support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, manage models with idiomatic Ruby blocks.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models with conversation memory.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for AI-assisted writing using local Ollama models: summarize, rewrite, translate, explain.
